message:
feat(resume): harden session path validation with UUID checks, false-positive guards, and structured error diagnostics

Resume path resolution now defends against several classes of misdetection:

- Claude Code paths require UUID-shaped filename stems when auto-detected;
  non-UUID paths like notes.jsonl are rejected with a clear hint to use
  --agent claude as an explicit override escape hatch
- OpenCode paths must live under an opencode.db parent directory; config
  files like ~/.config/opencode/config.json no longer false-match
- Codex paths with non-UUID stems are similarly gated
- Paths containing "claude_code" as a substring (e.g.
  my_claude_code_extension/) no longer falsely match the Claude Code
  heuristic — the canonical pattern requires .claude/projects/

Also adds a looks_like_session_uuid() helper with comprehensive test
coverage, and runtime validation that --exec/--shell flags are mutually
exclusive with --robot-format structured output. The --agent long help
now documents all accepted harness aliases including pi/omp variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
